input.headline: I do get jealous and question whether I’m cut out for non-monogamy

winner: Why did the polyamorous person bring a mirror to their relationship seminar? To double-check they weren't tripping over monogamy!

candidates.text: Why did the monogamist feel insecure at a party of polyamorists? Because he kept seeing someone else's eye catch his heart.
I never knew I was so possessive... until I found myself reading all their relationship status updates.
